data_in.description: QC4Metabolomics repository source code at v1.0.0 tag
GitHub release record dated 2025-07-29 with expected artifact specifications

data_out.description: Versioned release artifact bundle generated by Semantic Release at v1.0.0
Release metadata and verification report confirming artifact matches GitHub record

domain_knowledge: Semantic Release is an automated versioning and package publishing tool that reads commit history and generates version numbers following semantic versioning conventions.
The v1.0.0 tag marks a specific commit in the repository history that Semantic Release uses as a reference point for generating release artifacts.
GitHub release records contain canonical metadata (version, timestamps, file checksums, and artifact contents) that serve as the verification reference for release generation.
Artifact verification requires byte-for-byte comparison of generated files and cryptographic validation of checksums to ensure reproducibility.

direct_checks: verify file exists at GitHub release URL for tag v1.0.0 dated 2025-07-29
verify release contains commit hash d441874e737cd8d51ff8b384c459cc6acc5a36fc
verify release metadata includes Features section with 'add release and semantic release' (commit c869a78)
verify release metadata includes Bug Fixes section with 'one complete workflow' (commit d441874)
script_runs: execute semantic-release on checked-out QC4Metabolomics repository at v1.0.0 tag with standard configuration and verify exit code indicates success
verify semantic release output changelog contains all commit hashes and messages present in GitHub release record for v1.0.0
expert_review: confirm semantic release version numbering strategy (major.minor.patch) applied correctly to commit history through v1.0.4
validate that Bug Fixes entries in changelog (LFS files, filename update, naming, ignore rules, trigger release) correspond to actual code changes in repository
